string 2:
If I had some Coveweed, I could make an ointment... There's
usually some down at the shore.

Sorry to ask this of you, but would you go get me the Coveweed
I need?
Please, I beg of you...
I really hate to ask, but do you think you could track down Kamemon?

Kamemon should be in the village. That one's quite the
chatterbox, so it should be easy.
Heading underwater, are ya?
Want a ride?
Yes, please!
{end}Not right now.

There weren't any rocks here before... Could it be those
Titans again?

Huh? Looking for Coveweed, you say? It takes a bit of expertise,
you know...
Hmm... What to do, what to do? I think I ought to warn you...

There were Syakomon there, right? They're always trying
to steal themselves some Coveweed.

As an expert on the sea, I drive them off, but they always come 
back. And I never know which one has the stolen goods.

For greenhorns like you, I imagine the task will be next to
impossible.

Still, if you're dead set on getting some Coveweed,
I won't stand in your way.

Those Syakomon are a prickly bunch. Best keep your
wits about you, you hear me?
We got some!
Wait. What? Already?! Unbelievable!

So you were experts all along? Why didn't you say so in the
first place?

Shellmon, can you hear me? We brought the ingredients
you needed.
...No response, huh?
Let's just leave it here.
Oh, wait!

The Coral Fragments haven't arrived yet. I asked Kamemon to
get me some, but he still hasn't come back.

Could you try to track down Kamemon in the village? That
one's quite the chatterbox, so it should be easy.
If you really can't find him, could you please come back here?
Please! And thank you...
Well, well! Talk about a sight for sore eyes...!

Where have you been, my brother...? I was looking high and
low for you!
Bro! I got hurt out there, you see...
Well...! Is that so...? And what are you doing at this house?

I was just using it for a place to rest. Nothing of interest
in there, believe me...
Hmm? Are you sure...? I saw someone moving around...
What?! ...The guys next to us aren't from around here, I swear!

What game are you playing, my brother...? You know what
happens to traitors, do you not?
Well, no turning back now... You folks, help me out!
I thought you guys were friends?

Up until a little while ago, we were... Come on. Let's go
see the boss.

It's been a while, brother. Unlike most others, I understand 
your rather strange behavior.

You're pretending to be a traitor in order to deceive the
enemy and then you'll destroy the village, right?
Fantastic work! Come on, then! Hand them over!
...Why aren't you responding?
Unless... you really have turned traitor?!
Well, in that case... Never mind, then! It's all fine!

If I catch your traitorous self, I'll be named commander in 
no time flat! All right, you lot! Get them!

This is the place Shellmon told you about. Do you want to
blow the conch?
{next}[Blow the conch.]
{end}[Don't blow the conch.]
Whale, hop in!
Whale, are we going or what?
Yes, please!
{end}Not right now.
Whale, let's get going!

Glurp... Careful of those guys by the water, glurp.
They'll attack anything that moves, glurp...

Yar, Shellmon be 'oled up in its quarters for many a moon... 
The poor bilge rat won't let a soul inside.

When you gaze into the abyss, the abyss... stares back
at you, glurp.

Seeing those Titans around lately makes my skin crawl, glurp...
Still, where the heck are they coming from, glurp?

Sheesh... Between it being so slow near the waterside
and the nasties lurking all around, I can hardly take it.

Gee, I sure wish I could glide along like a fish in the water,
too...

I can't stand all the hubbub in the village. This spot's quiet
enough for a little rest and relaxation.

Whale, whale. Who are you folks again?
I feel like we've met before...

My memory's getting worse all the time.
I wonder why...?
Any-whale, what can I do you for?
Whale! You want to go there? Fine by me.

Hey! You don't know how to swim, do you?! It's too dangerous
for you to be here! Scram!
Okay, calm down. Tell me your symptoms one at a time.

Doesn't matter who you are, Titan or otherwise. We'll
diagnose and treat anyone and everyone here.

*sigh* Honestly, ever since the sea got polluted, it's been
nonstop busy around here.

I'd like to Digivolve soon and get out there to make a real
difference, but at this rate, who knows when that'll happen?

Wait. What's that you say? An urgent matter from Venusmon?
Merukimon is having an emergency?!
I'm not exactly sure what's going on, but aren't you...?

Yes...! Aren't you that human Venusmon keeps talking about?!
Hey, I've seen you before!

Why didn't you say something sooner?! Venusmon's here at the
field clinic, so head on over!
I noticed Whamon showing up as well. Did you summon him?

Well, keep an eye on him, will you? He's been acting kind of
strange lately!

Probably due to the pollution. Don't go getting yourself
drowned by Whamon! Hahaha!

Anyway, even with the sea this polluted, there's still a
swimming area over by the cove.

Makes me want to tell folks to stop adding to my patient
load! *sigh* Seriously...

Hey! If you're coming in, cough up some cash! This is how I
make a living, you know!

Hold on. You don't know how to swim, do you?! It's too
dangerous for you to be here! Scram!
*sigh* Now that Syakomon's gone, what am I supposed to do...?
Yuck... I ended up getting soaked in the sea. I feel so gross.

I miss the days when all I had to worry about was it being
kind of slow going...

Glurp... The sea is disgusting, and all these filthy guys
are lurking around, glurp. This is the worst, glurp.

I hear they're trying to rebuild the village, but it's got
to be tough with so few residents left.

Going near the water's a hassle and there are all those
violent types about, but sometimes I still want to swim.

Glurp... Those guys near the water have gotten even stronger
and more troublesome, glurp.

Phew... It's so busy I can't keep up! Even someone like me
is feeling the strain!

Can you believe this?! I'm supposed to be fighting through
fire, forests and bad guys!

I want to fight and Digivolve, but I'm so busy with patients
that I haven't been able to make any progress!
I mean, am I right?!
Right?! I should be out there giving it my all, don't you think?!

But something about abandoning the clinic just doesn't sit
well with me...

Plus, everyone's counting on me, you know? I can't just up
and leave...
Still, I'm really starting to think I could use a break.
I want to go for a swim in the ocean, too!

Oh, that reminds me. I heard Syakomon's fishery at the cove
shut down now that Syakomon's gone.

There's so much space at that place. I'd sure love to go
there for a swim next time I get the chance.

I ate some strange fruit, glurp. Now I'm not feeling so
great, glurp...
Glurp!

Admirin' me cards while on guard duty is so satisfyin'. I
can't wait to do battle!

Avast! I sense a worthy opponent in ye! Would ye do me the
honor of a card battle?!
[Challenge to a card battle.]
{end}Now is not the time.

Arr, I see! There are times when one just ain't in the
mood... Well, come on back if ye change yer mind!

What?! I lost?! Well, sink me! I'll 'ave to keep sharpenin'
me skills.

Victory is mine, me hearty! The fruits o' me daily trainin'
'ave paid off in spades!

Maybe it's to hunt down the Digimon in the village... Looks
like there's no other choice but to take another route.

I heard there's a savage Digimon at the bottom of the
ocean. I'm scared and curious at the same time.

Hm? You folks don't look like you're from around here. You
here to sightsee?

Shellmon's house is on the outskirts of the village. Perhaps
she would let her guard down and talk to outsiders like yourselves.

If there really is a Titan in there, be sure to let us know.
We'll take care of the rest!

Blow me down! More Titans?! Nay... Forgive me rudeness.
Been dealin' with too much of their ilk as o' late.

Feh, a fine kettle o' fish this all be. Make no mistake. We
send those scallywags packin' every time. But even so...!

WaruSeadramon, slow down! We're not even sure any
Titans are here among us.

Shaddup! You've always been soft as a guppy! That's why
they think they can get away with raiding us day in and day out.

If the casualties keep stacking up like this... I'll flush
out any shady suspects I can find, including our own!

I understand the intention, but keep a level head!
Until Shaujinmon makes a decision, just hold tight.
Customers...? Welcome...! But Titans attack lots these days...
Things are crazy here... But, welcome...! Relax...!

Leave the fight against the Titans to us, and you folks
stand back... for the sake of the future...

I came from Central Town! Master Monochromon told me all
about you!

Please lemme train with you! And, after that, let's have a
real battle! I wanna get nice and strong. I just gotta!

You're the apprentice of that little horn head, Monochromon,
aren't you? Now isn't the best time to talk training...

Why not?! The Titans keep coming around here, don't they?!
I gotta train. It'll toughen me up!
Oh, it's you, glurp. Looking to board Locomon, are you, glurp?
Yes, please!
{end}Not right now.
You got it, glurp! Just a moment, glurp!
Seriously, glurp? Don't go pulling my leg, glurp.

These days, it's all Titans this, Titans that...
I'm sooooo sick of it.

*sigh* This place is nice and cool, not like
that Factorial Area. Isn't it the best?

Whoa! It's MarineAngemon! Her singing
and dancing are as awesome as ever!

Just watching MarineAngemon soothes all the pain of fighting
with the Titans away! Oh, my sweet MarineAngemon!

The Titans could attack at any time,
but what are they doing?!

...You're here to help us fight the Titans, you say?
At Junomon's behest?

I'm happy to hear it. In that case,
can I ask you to do something?

Could you go and check on one of our own for us?
The Digimon is known as Shellmon.

There's a nasty rumor about that one going around.
We might have a traitor in our midst, if you get my drift.

Someone swore they saw a Titan entering
Shellmon's abode.

If that's true, then we've got a turncoat on our hands.
Turn-shell? You get the picture.

Maybe Shellmon would let her guard down
and talk to outsiders like you.

That's where you come in, if you'd be so kind.
The house is on the edge of the village.
It looks like we've been asked for help.

I'm curious about the rumor of a Titan sighting, too.
Let's head to the edge of the village.
Ungh...
{next}We have a survivor, here!
{next}You aren't hurt, are you?
{next}What happened here?
Ungh...
None the worse fer wear, be I... but...

A crew o' them scurvy Titan varlets came
and made a mess o' our fair 'aven...

...'Ow could it come to this sorry pass...?!
Ungh...
And where are those Titans now?
Returned to the briny depths, they 'ave...

I can't find 'ide nor 'air of my family and friends anywhere...
I'm at a loss, be I...
"Briny depths." That's the bottom of the ocean, right?
Your family...? That's just awful...!

Let's head back to Shellmon's house and
report the situation.

With our broadside exposed like it be, we can't
'ope to drop anchor 'ere no more... Ungh...

Curse them Titan scoundrels...!
I'll keelhaul every last one o' them...!

Oy, ye sunstruck, matey?! Ain't no passin'
through these 'ere parts! Off with ye! Get!

Hey, you! You, over there! I got up here, but now I can't
get down!

And I've got some important business to take care of! I'm
talking, earth-shattering stuff!

I'm struggling! Fighting for my life! Are you really just
gonna stand there and watch!?
You basically HAVE to save me at this point, don't you think?!

You'd abandon me? Throw me to the wolves?! Say it ain't so!
Could your conscience even bear it?!

Is this the end for little ol' me?! Such promise, cut short
in the prime of life?!

I always thought I'd at least make it to Mega level first...
Goodbye, cruel world...
I'm grateful for the memories! And for all my good friends!

Psych! Like I'd go out like that?! Now will you hurry up and
save me, already?!
A chatterbox, huh? I'm pretty sure we found Kamemon.
Wait, what?! You're not going to save me?!
Have a heart! Get rescuing! Chop-chop!
OUCH!! What the hell was that?!
OW! That really smarts! Who even are you!?

If anybody's got smarts here, it's me! What's yer deal, ya
blockhead?!
Well, at least I'm not some chrome dome like you!
Oh, yeah? I bet yer a real Mojyamon under that helmet of yers!

Hehehe. I couldn't hold a candle to those armpits of yours
if I tried!
HEY! Ya don't talk smack about another 'mon's pit-fro!
You're the one who started it! I'm just finishing it!
Oh, I'll give ya somethin' to finish, all right!
Rassa-frassing blah-blah-blah!
Rackin' frackin' yada-yada-yada!
And so I said, that's no Gawappamon. That's my mama!

Gahaha! You're a laugh and a half! I see why they call ya
"Comedimon"!

It's "Kamemon," pal! But, wow. That chortle of yours is
contagious! I see why they call you "Funnymon"!
It's "Nanimon," pal! But hey, whatever.

Oh, that's right. I got asked to run an errand. Do you folks
think you could take this to Shellmon in my place?

Aye, that be Locomon, yes? What an ole sea dog like me
wouldn't give fer a voyage aboard that fine vessel!

What? The Titans...? Well, while it's certainly true they
made a mess out of our village...

...Venusmon is working on peace negotiations right now. I
just want it all to go well.
What's that? How am I feeling? Nothing wrong with me.

Red mist? Everyone collapsing? What are you talking about?
You must be tired. I think you should get some rest.
What exactly are you gaping at?

Huh? Red mist from the sea? All the Digimon here got wiped
out? What are you talking about? You must've been dreaming.
From the look of things... It seems that time has been rewound.
Please continue to gather information.
Oh, thank God! I'm so glad you're okay!

Why are you so surprised? All the color has drained from
your face... But, come. Tell me. Where is the wine?
Well, you see...

The Abyss Area will be destroyed, you say? And there is
poison in the wine...?!
Am I supposed to believe all of this?
It's hard to believe, isn't it? Even I'm having a tough time...
Well, it's not as if I think you're lying... however...
...there is one thing you got absolutely correct.
The poison in the wine...
What?!

To be precise, it's a sedative. And I am the only one who
holds the antidote.

I simply wanted some leverage for negotiation. It wasn't
meant to take anyone's life.
Yeah... You can't negotiate with the dead...
However, we should retrieve the wine, to be sure.
Th-Thank you!

Let's hurry down to Neptunemon's place. I just hope
Neptunemon hasn't had any of that wine yet!
Allow me to accompany you this time. The situation is dire.
Go to Central Town?
Yes, let's head to Central Town.
{end}Not now.

I-It's you... *cough* As you can see, the sea is polluted
*cough* because it's been deprived of the purifying Current!

The Titans originally lived in remote areas that didn't
benefit from the Current, so they're used to it... *cough*

By the way... we negotiated a ceasefire with the Titans, so
there's no danger of attack... *cough*

My health is terrible because of the pollution... Maybe we
can talk more another time... *cough*

Arr! There still be a mountain o' things to do!
We'll just keep tacklin' 'em one at a time!
Ocean still dirty... Me no feel good... Somebody do something...?

Rain, wind and rough seas won't stop us, glurp! We'll push
forward with the reconstruction, glurp!
Oh, MarineAngemon... Where in the world have you gone...?

Just the thought of you eases my exhaustion from the
reconstruction! Oh, MarineAngemon!

The other day, I took a look around at the ocean floor and
saw this huge, terrifying creature. It freaked me out...
My friend, WaruSeadramon, left this place many years ago.

I heard rumors of the bottom of the ocean growing more
turbulent not long after that.
Could it be that WaruSeadramon was the cause...?

Please, summon my dear friend Whamon here. You have
the conch shell, do you not?
Whale, what do we have here? Didn't I just give you a ride?

Hm... My memory's a little fuzzy. Oh, whale. I'll just give
you another ride!
Whale to?
To Neptunemon... and please, hurry!
Whale, whale... So Lady Venusmon has a plan, then!
Whale, are you getting in?
{next}Yes, please!
{end}Not now.

Got something urgent to do? Whale, in that case,
don't worry about me. Get going, already!
It's been a while since we last saw Locomon, glurp...

Who knows what they're up to or even where they are, glurp...?
Not even a single word from them, glurp...

Well, as long as they're doing all right, I guess that's fine,
glurp...

...but I still think we deserve at least a note or something,
don't you, glurp?
Urgh! If only I had more power!
Master Brachiomon... I swear to you I will defeat this enemy!
My friend WaruSeadramon and I shared a complicated bond.

Before we came to this village, we both had our wild days...
a memory I look back on fondly.

I haven't seen WaruSeadramon since the attack. However,
they are not ones to go down easily.

Aye, that MasterBlimpmon... What an ole sea dog like me
wouldn't give fer a voyage aboard that fine vessel!

Oh! You're safe?! Thanks for your help with Shellmon
and everything!

But who would have thought Shellmon would Digivolve
into Venusmon?!

Venusmon and our new allies are busy restoring
the village, but you're more than welcome here.
Very quiet after stop fighting... Those new ones... calm now...
Lots of attacking before... Who controlling them...?
Even if they're on break... Honestly, those guys!
Me no see Titans lately... Peace, good.
WaruSeadramon used to be here back in the day.
But no one's seen it around since the village was attacked.

There hasn't been a single report of a sighting, so I'm not 
sure if it's even still alive...

WaruSeadramon is tough, though. Who knows? Maybe 
it's living at the bottom of the ocean somewhere.
Huh? Things are back to normal.
Speak to the villagers first.

Oh, MarineAngemon... You went to Central Town, saying you'd
be back once you made a name for yourself...
Whamon Summoning Event

Let's have a card battle! If I win, you have to help me
catch some fish!
[Challenge to a card battle.]
{end}Now is not the time.
Oh, you're no fun! Come on. Spend some time with me!
Darn it. I lost! I guess I'll go catch some fish for you instead!
Hurray! I win! Let's go catch some fish together!

Things have gotten dangerous around here... The perfect time
to calm our nerves with a card game, don't you think?
[Challenge to a card battle.]
{end}Now is not the time.

I get it. You've got duties to take care of. I'll stay here
and keep an eye on things for a while, then.

Shoot... A total loss. It was a good match, though.
It helped clear my head a bit.

Looks like I win. That was a close one! Thanks.
That made for a good break.

Everyone's got such long faces... I know! How about we liven
things up with a card game?
[Challenge to a card battle.]
{end}Now is not the time.

You've got things to do, I see. I'll have to think of some
other way to help cheer everyone up!

Ack! You got me! These card battles sure are something! 
I'll have to invite everyone for a match!

Hey, that's a win for me! Looks like everyone else is
itching to join in, too!

Head to the Abyss Area to investigate. We have to hurry and
resolve this new anomaly.

Hurry to Neptunemon to prevent the same tragedy from
happening again.
The current is too strong here to go any further.
This is no problem for me! Want a ride?
Want a ride to the ocean surface?
Yes, please!
{end}Not right now.

This area is our territory. It's even more dangerous than
the surface, so let's be extra careful.
Well, we can't go any further. The water's flowing too fast here.
But there is still a way. We could talk to Submarimon.

Submarimon is an old acquaintance of mine that lives down
deeper in the ocean.

It's a somewhat dicey area, but Submarimon should be able
to help us.
This is the place. Submarimon is up ahead.
Let me go talk to him alone.
Wait here. I'll bring Submarimon to you.

Are you sure you trust Divermon to go? Divermon is a Titan,
after all.

I'm not sure if he deserves to be trusted. And he did leave
you in an unsafe area...

Don't rule out the possibility of a trap, and don't let your
guard down.
Wait for Divermon here?
{next}Okay, we'll wait here.
{end}We still have other things to do.
Um, guys? We've got a little situation...
We're surrounded by enemies! Be careful!
I'm Submarimon! I'll take good care of ya!
I can even take ya straight to Sharkmon if ya want!

Submarimon is a bit odd, but he isn't a bad Digimon. Now
you'll be able to go against the current.
Now let's go see the boss.
Wait for Divermon here?
{next}Okay, we'll wait here.
{end}We still have other things to do.
After a while...
More enemies! They just keep coming...!
Setting sail again? I'll help ya on yer way.
Hey! What're you lookin' at?!
This ain't some sideshow attraction!
Hey! What are you doing?! It's dangerous. Get back!
You'll look suspicious if you stay here! Go away!
Whoa! What the heck is that giant thing?!
They won't stop targeting us! Are they an assassin?!
Well, well. What do we have here? This is a rare sight!
It's you folks, isn't it? Aren't you looking lively!

Ya haven't changed a bit, have ya? So what
brings ya all the way down to a place like this?

Negotiate with the Titans? A gift? In that case,
ya should meet the boss, Neptunemon.

Still, the Titans are behaving strange for some reason.
They've been acting out, so I better join ya.

There's been someone causing all kinds of trouble
lately. It's been a real pain.

Now that you're all here, it's the perfect chance
to let loose on 'em, just like old times!

We'll put that troublemaker in their place!
Calm things down around here again!

The boss, Neptunemon, is just up ahead. It must be
tough having so many hot-blooded subordinates.

I'm gonna patrol the area to make sure those guys
blocking the road don't cause any trouble... See ya later.
Oh, you're back! Hey, what do ya think? Pretty impressive, huh?
Oh, you're back, huh?

Come by and visit whenever ya feel like it. Always glad to
have ya.
All right, let's get moving. I'll take ya up to the surface.
I'll take ya up to the surface.

Well, then, see ya next time. Give my regards to Shellmon...!
Or was it Venusmon?

What's that? More business to see to?
As busy as ever, I see.
I'll show ya the way.
Let's get going! Hold on tight, now!

What's that? More business to see to?
As busy as ever, I see.

I never expected I would ever get the chance to
see you all again.
And Shellmon is safe as well? That is a relief.
When you return to the village, please tell Shellmon this:

"You are my savior. I shall do everything in my power to
repay your kindness."
Greetings. Welcome to the Titan base.
May I inquire as to what business brings you here today?

If you have no particular reason to be here, I would advise
you to leave.

Even though we are in a temporary ceasefire... we are still
Titans, after all.

Tch! This ceasefire is such a bore. I'm starting to feel
sluggish with absolutely nothing to do.
Hmm? You are... the one who was with my brother, yes?

You really did me a disservice back then... I would like to
repay you in kind, but...

...since you're a friend of my brother, I suppose I will
let you go.
Hah! Be grateful to my big-shot brother for this...
What's that? Ya came here knowin' it's our base?

You've sure got some guts, don't ya?!
Well, make yerselves comfortable, then.

It would seem you are awake. You were in quite a
precarious state for a while.
You! You're a Titan! Prepare yourself!

Now, now. Calm down. You will only aggravate your injuries.
It is best to remain still.
Besides, you seem to have quite the potential.

Stop talking nonsense...! Damn it! What in the world is
going on?!

My memory after leaving the village is... Damn it! What in
the world is going on?!

I never expected I would ever get the chance to
see you all again.

Your appearance has changed so much.
However, I recognized you the instant I saw you.

I am glad for the chance to express my gratitude.
You have saved me once again.

But to think... that Lanamon has been targeting me
all this time...
I will need to remain vigilant against assassins going forward.

Got something urgent to do? Whale, in that case,
don't worry about me. Get going, already!
Whale, whale. What's the matter? Do you want to go back?
Yes.
{end}No.

Eh? Ya lookin' to start somethin'? Why don't we settle this
with a card battle?!
[Challenge to a card battle.]
{end}Now is not the time.

Combat is great and all, but I'm hooked on card battles
right now! If ya ain't lookin' for a match, then scram!
I can't believe I lost! Ya ain't half bad, ya know?!
I win! My cards are seriously strong!
It's a large tank. There's liquid inside.
It cannot be... Lanamon...was deceiving me...?

Sorry, but could you go and check how the village is doing?
I'm worried about everyone, but I can't leave my post.
Please! I'm begging you...!

If you blow the conch by the shore, my dear friend will
come and help you.
My friend can take you where you need to go.
Thank you for taking care of Divermon. And be careful!
There are plants and bottles lined up here.
Those are for the medicines I prepare.

I want to be a doctor someday, so I'm studying how to grow 
herbs and make medicines.
Shellmon's belongings are here.

Um, I haven't quite cleared that area up yet. Please don't
mind my mess.
There are carefully tended plants here.

I am afraid I am unable to leave at the moment... I beg your
forgiveness.
There are bottles and boxes here that are filled with something.

Those are medical supplies. I keep them stocked for the
patients.
There are a bunch of randomly placed items here.

I am so busy treating patients every day that I hardly have
time to tidy up...

I'm so bored. Hey! You have some cards, right?!
Let's have a battle!
[Challenge to a card battle.]
{end}Now is not the time.
I see... That's too bad. I hope these injuries heal up soon...
Man, I lost?! Still, that was fun! Thanks for playing with me!
All right! Now I just need to heal up these injuries!
